name: Rolled Oats Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot water and sweetened condensed milk over the rolled oats and let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Add corn syrup, cooking oil, and beaten egg yolks to the oat mixture.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture until smooth.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Fill well-oiled muffin tins about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 20 minutes.
